steps.title: Identify what the blank must mean
steps.content:
The passage emphasizes that the ablution area is "almost always included" in mosque designs and represents a "standard feature."
The blank needs a word for a characteristic or defining element of mosque architecture.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the correct word
steps.content:
The ablution area is considered to be a ______ of mosque architecture — it's "almost always included" and a "standard feature," so the blank must mean a defining or characteristic element. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — duplicate: an exact copy — the ablution area is a defining feature, not a copy of something else. ✗
  • Choice B — motivation: a reason for doing something — the passage doesn't say the ablution area motivates mosque design. ✗
  • Choice C — rejection: a refusal or dismissal — the opposite; this feature is consistently included. ✗
  • Choice D — hallmark: a distinctive characteristic or defining feature — perfectly matches something "almost always included" and described as standard. ✓
That is the correct answer.
